calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 9:00am. On May 5,2003.
Off Calendar May-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, and CSR: Patricia Dowling.
Plaintiff, Alfred Young present with counsel, Steve Larson.
Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
Court hears evidence and supporting document presented in court, grants default judgment in favor of the plaintiff, Alfred Young and against the defendant Gordon Wong, Trustee of the Benjamin and Sons Trust. See scanned document.
Judgment signed in open court.
